attacking_style: Attacks with 2-6km remaining on summit finishes, showing tactical maturity to collaborate after initial acceleration. Rarely goes ultra-long; prefers late, decisive moves on steep gradients where TT power translates.
team_tactics: UAE provides complete protection on flat stages when in GC position, but tactical coordination occasionally fails (Catalunya 2022, Paris-Nice split). Given freedom to attack when not sole leader; team hierarchy remains fluid based on form.
terrain_preference: Excels on power climbs and uphill time trials where sustained watts matter more than pure w/kg. Strong on gravel summits and technical finishes. Vulnerable at extreme altitude (Stelvio crack, Tre Cime losses) and against lighter pure climbers on third-week mountain stages.
vulnerability: Cracks on multi-hour high-altitude efforts (lost 4:51 on Stelvio). Concentration lapses under pressure (navigation error Vuelta 2022, positioning failures). Ceiling exposed when facing consecutive mountain stages against specialist lightweights. Occasionally passive when defending small GC gaps.
key_patterns: Time trial strength significantly exceeds typical climber profile, gaining positions in flat/climbing TTs (6+ observations)
Attacks summit finishes in final 2-6km, rarely earlier, showing diesel power over explosivity (5 observations)
Positioning errors in crucial moments: missed splits, navigation mistakes, caught behind accelerations (4 observations)
Performs stronger when supporting role allows freedom; sometimes outperforms designated leader (4 observations)
Third-week Grand Tour fade pattern: cracked Stelvio, lost minute Tre Cime, multiple late-race drops (5 observations)
Opportunistically sprints for bonus seconds even when in GC jersey, aggressive time management (4 observations)
form_trajectory: neutral: 2023 Giro podium (first Portuguese GT podium since 1970s) shows sustained elite level, but Tre Cime collapse and inability to challenge top-two reveals unchanged ceiling against absolute best. Still strong enough to win stages and threaten podiums, but explosive power deficit persists.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 18
